narrative:
Cincinnati 2-E (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,283 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
